name: VehAnchor: Metadata-Free Metric Scale Recovery from Vehicle Cues in Aerial Imagery
summary: arXiv:2603.04277v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Autonomous aerial robots operating in GPS-denied or communication-degraded environments frequently lose access to camera metadata and telem...
description: arXiv:2603.04277v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Autonomous aerial robots operating in GPS-denied or communication-degraded environments frequently lose access to camera metadata and telemetry, leaving onboard perception systems unable to recover the absolute metric scale of the scene. As LLM/VLM-based planners are increasingly adopted as high-level agents for embodied systems, their a...
author: Yifei Chen, Chenqian Le, Jiayi Cheng, Xupeng Chen
